qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t.c_liquidacion AS CODE, t.c_empresa AS PID FROM LIQ99_LIQUIDACION as t WHERE t.oi_liquidacion_ddo = {#SOURCE:@ID} AND t.c_estado = \'F\' ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t.oi_liquidacion_ddo as ID, t.c_liquidacion AS CODE, t.d_titulo AS TEXT, SEC.policy, t.c_empresa AS PID FROM LIQ99_LIQUIDACION as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.LiquidacionDDO.LIQUIDACION_DDO\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_liquidacion_ddo LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.c_liquidacion = {#SOURCE:@CODE} AND t.c_empresa = {#SOURCE:@PID} AND t.c_estado = \'F\' ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: ObtenerCantidad
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT COUNT(l.oi_tot_liq_per) as cont FROM liq99_recibos as l WHERE l.oi_liquidacion_ddo = {#SOURCE:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS3
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT max(emp.oi_empresa_ddo) as PID FROM LIQ93_EMPRESAS as emp WHERE emp.c_empresa = {#SOURCE:@PID} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS4
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT emp.c_empresa as CODE, emp.d_empresa AS TEXT FROM LIQ93_EMPRESAS as emp WHERE emp.oi_empresa_ddo = {#SOURCE:@PID} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t.oi_liquidacion_ddo as ID, t.c_liquidacion AS CODE, t.d_titulo AS TEXT, SEC.policy, t.c_empresa AS PID FROM LIQ99_LIQUIDACION as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.LiquidacionDDO.LIQUIDACION_DDO\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_liquidacion_ddo LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.c_liquidacion = {substring_after(#SOURCE:@CODE,\'-\')} AND t.c_empresa = {substring_before(#SOURCE:@CODE,\'-\')} AND t.c_estado = \'F\' ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT max(emp.oi_empresa_ddo) as PID FROM LIQ93_EMPRESAS as emp WHERE emp.c_empresa = {#SOURCE:@PID} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS4
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT emp.c_empresa as CODE, emp.d_empresa AS TEXT FROM LIQ93_EMPRESAS as emp WHERE emp.oi_empresa_ddo = {#SOURCE:@PID} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: ObtenerCantidad
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT COUNT(l.oi_tot_liq_per) as cont FROM liq99_recibos as l WHERE l.oi_liquidacion_ddo = {#SOURCE:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT emp.c_empresa AS CODE, emp.d_empresa AS TEXT FROM LIQ93_EMPRESAS AS emp WHERE emp.c_empresa = {#SOURCE:@PARENTID} GROUP BY emp.c_empresa, emp.d_empresa ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t.oi_liquidacion_ddo as ID, t.c_liquidacion as CODE, t.d_titulo AS TEXT, SEC.policy FROM LIQ99_LIQUIDACION as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.LiquidacionDDO.LIQUIDACION_DDO\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_liquidacion_ddo LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.c_empresa = {#SOURCE:@CODE} AND t.c_estado = \'F\' ORDER BY CODE asc ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: ObtenerCantidad
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT COUNT(l.oi_tot_liq_per) as cont FROM liq99_recibos as l WHERE l.oi_liquidacion_ddo = {#SOURCE:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS3
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t.c_empresa as CODE, t.d_empresa as TEXT FROM LIQ93_EMPRESAS as t WHERE t.c_empresa={#SOURCE:@PARENTID} GROUP BY t.c_empresa, t.d_empresa ORDER BY CODE asc ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' select t.c_empresa from LIQ99_LIQUIDACION as t where t.oi_liquidacion_ddo = {#SOURCE:@ID} AND t.c_estado = \'F\' ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t.oi_liquidacion_ddo as ID, t.c_liquidacion as CODE, t.d_titulo as TEXT, t.c_empresa as PID FROM LIQ99_LIQUIDACION as t WHERE t.c_empresa = {#SOURCE:@PARENTID} AND t.c_estado = \'F\' ORDER BY CODE asc ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: ObtenerCantidad
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT COUNT(l.oi_tot_liq_per) as cont FROM liq99_recibos as l WHERE l.oi_liquidacion_ddo = {#SOURCE:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW
